paper.abstract_en: Although previous results have ruled out the possibility of a static event horizon in cosmology, we present black hole and white hole metrics that retain static event horizons while reproducing cosmological behavior at large distances. Using an appropriate coordinate choice, we demonstrate that a static event horizon can exist in a cosmological setting without introducing curvature invariant singularities at the horizon. The resulting metric reduces to the Schwarzschild de Sitter solution when the Hubble parameter is constant. We find that white hole metrics in an expanding universe, or black holes in a contracting universe, are significantly easier to construct, as a black hole in an expanding cosmology requires the velocity function to change sign. Consequently, this work initially examines white holes in expanding cosmologies as a foundation for subsequent analysis of black holes in expanding universes. In later sections, we investigate scenarios involving a white hole coupled with cosmological matter, as well as a white hole with both matter and a cosmological constant. Assuming the pressure component takes its cosmological value, we show that the physical radius of the apparent horizon can asymptotically approach a constant value at late times. This metric avoids pathologies such as a singular horizon in the limit of a vanishing Hubble parameter. Finally, we analyze the realistic case of a black hole embedded in pressureless cosmological matter with and without a cosmological constant and explore its properties. We specifically show that the velocity function can become zero and change sign in the vicinity of a black hole. This means we can smoothly transition from an expanding cosmological phase with a positive velocity function to a contracting black hole phase with a negative velocity function.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文提出在宇宙学背景下存在静态事件视界的可能性，涉及视界构造和度量性质，属于广义相对论基础研究方向，且理论深度和原创性较高。
decision.abstract_zh: 尽管先前的结果排除了宇宙学中存在静态事件视界的可能性，我们提出了在保持静态事件视界的同时在大距离上重现宇宙学行为的黑洞和白洞度量。通过适当的坐标选择，我们证明，在不引入曲率不变奇点的情况下，静态事件视界可以在宇宙学背景中存在。当哈勃参数为常数时，所得度量简化为史瓦西德西特解。我们发现，膨胀宇宙中的白洞度量或收缩宇宙中的黑洞度量更容易构造，因为膨胀宇宙学中的黑洞要求速度函数改变符号。因此，这项工作首先研究膨胀宇宙中的白洞，作为后续分析膨胀宇宙中黑洞的基础。在后面的章节中，我们研究了白洞与宇宙学物质耦合的情况，以及白洞同时具有物质和宇宙学常数的情况。假设压力分量取其宇宙学值，我们证明，在晚期，表观视界的物理半径可以渐近地趋近一个常数值。该度量避免了在哈勃参数趋于零的极限下出现奇异视界等病态。最后，我们分析了嵌入无压宇宙学物质（有或没有宇宙学常数）中的黑洞的现实情况，并探讨了其性质。我们特别证明了速度函数可以在黑洞附近变为零并改变符号。这意味着我们可以从具有正速度函数的膨胀宇宙相平滑过渡到具有负速度函数的收缩黑洞相。
